summary: Video. A Fox News Channel segment ('The First 100 Days / Immigration Crackdown') previewing Secretary Noem's trip to El Salvador, Colombia, and Mexico, anchored by correspondent Griff Jenkins from Washington with the chyron 'NOEM TO TOUR PRISON HOLDING DEPORTED CRIMINALS.' It mixes B-roll of the CECOT prison, a Noem clip from the White House, and footage of her aboard a military aircraft. It is a cable-news report, with no music.
notable_text: NOEM TO TOUR PRISON HOLDING DEPORTED CRIMINALS
